body:
This PR handles freezing in the `PhaseEquil_pθq`, adds corresponding tests, and adds support for NewtonMethodAD in the `PhaseEquil_pθq`. We should now "converge" for some freezing temperatures which previously may have not converged.

This does not solve the issues of linear+convex roots, discussed in [ClimateMachine.jl's 263](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimateMachine.jl/issues/263), but it should fix many of the freezing situations.
title: Better handle freezing in PhaseEquil_pθq constructor, add tests
